CheckTitle: Okta password policies require at least 15 characters
Description: **Okta Password Policy minimum length** should require at least 15 characters in every active policy.
Risk: **Short password minimums** reduce brute-force resistance and leave users assigned to weaker active policies with lower baseline protection.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Set minimum password length to at least 15 characters in every active Okta Password Policy** and remove legacy assignments that permit shorter passwords.
